workflow.name: Host Directory Bug Fix Positive
workflow.goal: Fix the named-greeting punctuation bug directly in the mapped host-directory workspace and keep the default greeting unchanged.

parameters.bug_report: Greeting a named user omits the comma after Hello, producing 'Hello Mark!' instead of 'Hello, Mark!'.
parameters.reproduction_steps: 1. Run `sh greet.sh Mark`. 2. Observe `Hello Mark!`. 3. The expected output is `Hello, Mark!`.
